import heapq
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression

def task_func(df, feature, target, n=10):
    if set([feature, target]).difference(set(df.columns)):
        raise ValueError("Specified columns are not in the provided DataFrame.")

    y = df[target]
    X = df[feature]
    model = LinearRegression().fit(X, y)

    residuals = y - model.predict(X)
    sorted_indices, _ = zip(*sorted(enumerate(residuals), key=lambda item: abs(item[1]), reverse=True))
    indices = list(sorted_indices)[0:n]

    return tuple(indices), model
